goal: Switch the PDF page-image hot path back to JPEG@0.88, keep WebP as a developer-only debug override, and add dynamic scaling plus regression coverage.
acceptanceCriteria: Default page image encoding is JPEG@0.88
WebP is not used in the default hot path
Dynamic scaling varies by page profile
Parameterized tests cover multiple PDF page types
nonGoals: Expose a user-facing image format setting
Rework the broader PDF rendering architecture
